parents.subject: LU-10391 lnet: Change LNetDist to work with struct lnet_nid

commit.subject: LU-10391 lnet: convert LNetPut to take 16byte nid and pid.
commit.message:
LU-10391 lnet: convert LNetPut to take 16byte nid and pid.

LNetPut() now takes a 16byte nid for self and similar process_id for
target.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.12 serverdistro=el7.9 testlist=runtests
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.12 testlist=runtests
